overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval castle town. The character travels along a sunlit waterfront promenade, passes through a stone gate into a muddy courtyard, and continues through narrow cobblestone streets lined with timber-framed buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path beside the castle walls, passing a guard

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing stationary by the path

entered.detail: tall medieval stone fortification wall with crenellations
irregular cobblestone walkway along the water
simple wooden fence separating path from water
calm water canal running alongside the castle
cylindrical stone tower with conical roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit waterfront promenade with a stone castle wall on the left and a calm canal on the right. A guard in red armor stands by the path as the character moves forward on the cobblestones toward a distant tower.

agents.ego_description: approaching the main castle gate entrance along the waterfront

entered.detail: large metal fire pit burning brightly near the gate
fortified stone entrance with red banners

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the waterfront path, the scene opens toward a fortified castle gate with burning braziers marking the entrance. The stone tower recedes behind as the camera approaches the arched gateway.

events.description: passing through stone gate archway from waterfront into interior courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the gate into the castle courtyard, navigating around wooden scaffolding

notable_agents.action: group of villagers gathered near wooden stairs

entered.detail: shadowed stone tunnel entrance with portcullis
open dirt ground area with scattered wooden planks
tall wooden staircase leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone gate into a semi-enclosed courtyard with muddy ground and wooden construction scaffolding. Villagers gather near wooden stairs as the lighting shifts to mixed shadows from the surrounding walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street between timber buildings

events.description: exiting courtyard into narrow street with timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up the narrow street following a villager toward a large timber building

notable_agents.action: villager in brown tunic walking ahead toward the building

entered.detail: winding cobblestone path between tall buildings
large three-story half-timbered house with red drapes
simple wooden picket fence along stone wall
timber structures with jettied upper floors

segments.scene_description: Exiting the courtyard, the scene transitions to a narrow cobblestone street flanked by overhanging timber-framed buildings. The character follows a villager toward a prominent three-story building with red banners while the stone wall continues along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront promenade into the enclosed, shadowed streets of a medieval castle town. It begins with Geralt walking along a sunlit cobblestone path between a calm canal and a towering stone wall, passing a guard in red armor. As the character moves forward, the scene opens toward a fortified castle gate marked by burning braziers, with the distant tower receding as the camera approaches the arched entrance. The camera then passes through the gateway into a semi-enclosed courtyard where the bright sunlight shifts to mixed shadows over muddy ground and wooden scaffolding. Finally, the scene transitions from the courtyard into a narrow cobblestone street flanked by overhanging timber-framed buildings, following a villager toward a three-story structure adorned with red banners.
